untranslatable_reason: This signal requires domain-specific calculations not available in standard technical indicators: (1) Futures fair value computation (requires dividend yield, interest rates, and time-to-expiration), (2) Basis/discount tracking between spot and futures, (3) Arbitrage cost thresholds that are input-driven rather than price-derived. The signal logic (buy stock/sell futures spread) is a multi-asset strategy that cannot be expressed using single-asset price indicators. Parameters marked with [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] lack numerical definitions and require external data sources.
translation_notes: This is an index arbitrage signal (cash-and-carry/reverse cash-and-carry) requiring real-time futures basis monitoring and simultaneous execution across two markets (spot index and futures). It cannot be implemented in a single-asset backtest engine using only technical indicators on one price series.
